Home **/** Chandigarh **/** PM Modi’s Haryana, Chandigarh, Punjab July 17 itinerary: India’s 1st hydrogen train, Rs 25,000-crore projects. # PM Modi’s Haryana, Chandigarh, Punjab July 17 itinerary: India’s 1st hydrogen train, Rs 25,000-crore projects. Prime Minister Narendra Modi would undertake a day-long visit to Haryana, Chandigarh and Punjab on Wednesday unveiling development projects worth around Rs 25,000 crore spanning railways, highways, healthcare, education and infrastructure. The visit would be headlined by the launch of India's first hydrogen-powered passenger train and the inauguration of 75 redeveloped Amrit Bharat railway stations across the country. PM Modi will inaugurate and lay the foundation stone of projects worth over Rs 4,700 crore. PM Modi to visit Haryana, Chandigarh and Punjab on July 17; unveil projects worth around Rs 26,800 crore PM Modi to visit Haryana, Chandigarh and Punjab on July 17; unveil projects worth around Rs 26,800 crore. New Delhi [India], July 15 (ANI): Prime Minister Narendra Modi will visit Haryana, Chandigarh and Punjab on July 17 and roll out projects worth around Rs 26,800 crore. The release said that the Prime Minister will also dedicate to the nation as well as lay the foundation stone of National Highway projects worth over Rs 12,470 crores in Haryana. In Chandigarh, PM Modi will inaugurate and lay the foundation stone of multiple projects worth over Rs 6,600 crore, spanning healthcare, education and road infrastructure.
